name: AS Baltika
summary: AS Baltika, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a fashion retailer. It operates through Retail, E-commerce, and All Other segments. The company engages in the design, development, production, and sales arrangement of the fashion brands of clothing; and the provision of materials and sewing services. It develops and operates fashion brands, including Monton, Baltman, and Ivo Nikkolo. The company sells its products through retail and e-commerce channel, and other sales channels, including wholesale, franchise, and consignation. As of December 31, 2020, it had 61 Baltika's retail-stores in Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, and Finland. AS Baltika was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Tallinn, Estonia.
